query_normalized: quantifying the impact of dataset size on the accuracy of machine learning models for predicting material properties physics
rationale: The paper focuses on a specific model architecture (OGCNN) and its superiority over other descriptors for material property prediction, but it does not investigate the relationship between dataset size and model accuracy, nor does it establish an empirical baseline for how scaling data volume impacts performance in this domain. While it addresses the general topic of "material property prediction," it fails to satisfy any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) regarding the specific mechanism of datase
